title.zh: 03 GitHub Pages 部署失败诊断

basis.zh: 失败截图、run id、workflow 文件、最新提交 SHA
basis.en: Failure screenshot, run id, workflow file, and latest commit SHA

basis.zh: 失败步骤、修复提交、新 run、线上 200 响应
basis.en: Failed step, fix commit, new run, and live 200 response

basis.zh: npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check
basis.en: npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check

basis.zh: deploy-incident.md、修复提交、验证命令记录
basis.en: deploy-incident.md, fix commit, and validation command record

zh: npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check
en: npm run build && npm run check && git diff --check
